title: May 20, 2026
sentiment: Understanding arrives suddenly, the way a half-remembered word surfaces only when you stop reaching for it.

stories.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
stories.summary: An AI proving a conjecture mathematicians couldn't reach is a quiet inversion of everything we thought we knew about understanding.

stories.title: GitHub confirms breach of 3,800 repos via malicious VSCode extension
stories.summary: The trust we place in tooling is a surface area that attackers will always probe — and 3,800 repos is a lot of surface.

stories.title: The Letter S, by Donald Knuth (1980)
stories.summary: Knuth's forty-year-old meditation on a single letter reminds us that beauty lives in the detail most people never look at twice.
